The 3N Ads Formula
I've been involved in marketing since 2003 (does that show my age - eeek!) and in
that time I've worked with the top media agencies, expert marketers and brand
experts.
The following videos are a condensed look at the learnings I've developed over that
period that form the basis of creating Facebook campaigns that work. Campaigns
that adapt with the increasing changes that Facebook make, using strategies and
concepts to cut through in the newsfeed.
The 3N Ads Formula below is focused on 3 things. Ads that Stop The Scroll, Engage
and Convert.
3N Ads Intro
VIDEO 1
VIDEO 2
VIDEO 3
VIDEO 4
Why You Need The 3N Formula!
Take a look at the video and see how many of these ads catch your attention and
which ones in particular stand out, if any.
Is it colour? Copy? Image? Something else?
This is exactly how your ads compete against other posts in a typical Facebook
news feed.
But that's not the only thing to know.
Some of these ads work because of the frequency by which people see them.They
can afford a high frequency as there's nothing else to look at when shifting between
stops in the underground/subway.
High frequency for campaigns isn't always bad however high frequency for a single
ad can be as it becomes wallpaper.
Keep your images simple and grab their attention, using copy and/or video to
convert.We're bombarded with hundreds often thousands of ads every single day.
Stand out.
Be memorable.
Be smarter than your competition.
Video 5
